title: Best Agricultural Rental Lighting Design Review Software Comparison: Efficiency Strategies | 2026 Review
description: Comprehensive comparison of agricultural tools software. Analyze features, pricing, and efficiency improvements for small businesses. Find the best solution for your needs! Expert review helps you decide.
content:
Architectural design software lighting design: light tools for lighting analysis

Lighting design is an important part of architectural design quality. From lighting analysis to light configuration, from lamp layout to energy consumption calculation, lighting design helps designers optimize architectural lighting. This article will comprehensively evaluate the lighting design functions of mainstream architectural design software to help architects master lighting design tools.

Corevalu of lighting design e

Lighting design plays key functions in architectural design:

  • Lighting analysis: architectural lighting analysis and calculation
  • Light configuration: architectural light configuration design
  • Lighting arrangement: architectural lighting layout design
  • Energy consumption calculation: lighting energy consumption calculation and analysis
  • Lighting standards: lighting standard specification inspection

In-depth Review: Mainstream lighting design function

ElumTools lighting design

ElumTools is a professional software for architectural lighting analysis.

Core Features:

  • Lighting Analysis
  • Light Calculation
  • Lamp Placement
  • Energy Consumption Calculation
  • Lighting Standards

ElumTools Lighting:

ElumT ools' Coreadvantages is lighting analysis. Designers can accurately analyze the effectiveness of architectural lighting.

Light calculation:

  • The software supports light calculation to calculate building light distribution.

Lighting Analyst lighting design

Lighting Analyst is a professional software for architectural lighting analysis.

Core Features:

  • Lighting analysis
  • Light configuration
  • Lighting arrangement
  • Energy consumption calculation
  • Lighting report

Lighting Analyst Lighting:

Lighting Analyst's Corevantages are light configurations. Designers can configure architectural light distribution.

Lighting fixture layout:

  • The software supports lighting fixture layout and arrange the location of architectural lighting fixtures.

DIALux lighting design

DIALux is a professional software for architectural lighting design.

Core Features:

  • Lighting Design
  • Lamp Selection
  • Light Calculation
  • Energy Consumption Calculation
  • Lighting Report

DIALux Lighting:

DIA Lux's Coreadvantages is a choice of lighting fixtures. Designers can choose suitable lighting products.

Energy consumption calculation:

  • The software supports energy consumption calculation to calculate the effectiveness of lighting energy consumption.

Lighting design development trend forecast

Smart lighting analysis

Smart lighting analysis will be more in-depth. The software can be smart analyze lighting effectiveness, optimize lighting design.

LED lighting optimization

LED lighting optimization will be more improved. Software can optimize LED lighting effectiveness ness, reduce energy consumption.

Lighting energy-saving design

Lighting energy-saving design will be more important. Designers can optimize lighting energy-saving and reduce energy consumption.

Lighting BIMintegration

Lighting BIMintegration will be more improved ent. Deep integration of lighting design and BIM model.

Purchasing suggestions

When choosing a lighting design solution, it is recommended to consider:

  • Analysis requirements: Assess lighting analysis calculation requirements
  • Light requirements: Assess light configuration design requirements
  • Lamps Requirements: Assess lighting fixture layout selection requirements
  • Energy consumption requirements: Assess lighting energy consumption calculation requirements
  • Standard requirements: Assess lighting standard inspection requirements

Lighting design is a light tool for lighting analysis. Choose appropriate lighting design solutions and optimize architectural design lighting effectiveness.
